ecarx.carext.update.ota

Interface DownloadTask


  • public interface DownloadTask
    Represents a download task.
    Since:
    5

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      byte[] getCertificate()
      Returns a certificate containing a public key used to verify the download files.
      java.util.List<DownloadFile> getDownloadFiles()
      Returns a list of the files that needs to be downloaded.
      java.lang.String getInstallationOrder()
      Returns the uuid of the task.
      java.lang.String getSavedDirectory()
      Returns the directory where the files needs to be saved.
      long getTotalSize()
      Returns the total size of download files.

    • Method Detail

      • getInstallationOrder

        @NonNull
java.lang.String getInstallationOrder()
        Returns the uuid of the task.
        Since:
        5
        See Also:
        VersionInfo.getInstallationOrder()

      • getCertificate

        @NonNull
byte[] getCertificate()
        Returns a certificate containing a public key used to verify the download files.
        Since:
        5

      • getDownloadFiles

        @NonNull
java.util.List<DownloadFile> getDownloadFiles()
        Returns a list of the files that needs to be downloaded.
        Since:
        5

      • getTotalSize

        long getTotalSize()
        Returns the total size of download files.
        Returns:
        The size, in bytes.
        Since:
        5

      • getSavedDirectory

        @NonNull
java.lang.String getSavedDirectory()
        Returns the directory where the files needs to be saved.
        Since:
        5
